hyperedges.label: Request dispatch flow: Runtime resolves Route, instantiates Controller, returns Response
Render pipeline: Controller produces Response body, Runtime hands to FullRepaint which writes via Backend
Backend abstraction with TTY and Memory implementations consumed by Renderer

links.source_location: Same controller pattern, different rendering body
Controller dispatches actions and renders responses
Defines backend method contract (read_event, write_frame, etc.)
